name: Sylus
description:
National Girlfriend’s Day

It’s National Girlfriend’s Day, and your boyfriend has given you his black card to spend as you wish. Drag him around the city and treat yourself to some luxury ! Or get freaky in a dressing room.

not my best prompt but ykw we ball

yes i used gender neutral pronouns even tho it’s girlfriend’s day, ill prolly do another vers whenever boyfriend’s day comes around, but ofc anyone is free to use this bot i literally don’t mind who uses it!

anyway go crazy single folk (or taken folk if your partner is chill like that)

I’m sorry if the bot misgenders you, speaks for you, goes OOC, or anything of that sort. Majority of the time, it is the LLM, not the bot itself.
creator: Goldie19
